svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph TD
 HostFetch["host fetch"] --> SetSchemas["provider.setSchemas(schemas)"]
 SetSchemas --> MCMSchemas["AppData.MCM.Schemas"]
 SetSchemas --> MCMTypes["AppData.MCM.ConnectionTypes"]
 SetSchemas --> RefreshViews["refreshViews()"]
 MCMSchemas --> FormDefs["form view field definitions"]
 MCMTypes --> SelectOptions["detail view <select> options"]

 ClickEdit["user clicks Edit"] --> SelectConn["provider.selectConnection(i)"]
 SelectConn --> CurrentConn["CurrentConnection (deep copy)"]
 CurrentConn --> DetailRender["detail.render()"]
 DetailRender --> OnAfterRender["onAfterRender: form.setSchemas + form.setValues"]

 EditSave["user edits + Save"] --> OnSave["detail.onSave()"]
 OnSave --> GetConfig["form.getProviderConfig()"]
 GetConfig --> CurrentConnConfig["CurrentConnection.Config"]
 OnSave --> ValidateConfig["provider.validateConfig()"]
 OnSave --> SaveCurrent["provider.saveCurrentConnection()"]
 SaveCurrent --> ConnectionsI["Connections[i]"]
","style":"notebook"}
